title: ischaemum indicum subvar. longipilum
intro: Ischaemum indicum subvar. longipilum, also known as Japanese Blue Grass or long-bearded Japanese Blue Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to East Asia, characterized by its blue-green foliage and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ischaemum indicum subvar. longipilum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
